<var>
$DPS$ = Damage / Swingrate
$AFDPS$ = Frozen Damage / Swingrate
$DPS2$ = $DPS$ + $AFDPS$
$FNC-ROFBUG$ = Swingrate
$FNC-COST$ = 950; 400; 1650; 3200; 8520; 16000
$CE$ = Total Price / DPS
$FREF$ = <ref>Frozen damage is dealt when hitting enemies that are already frozen or chilled. Frozen damage is double the regular damage.</ref>
$DREF$ = <ref>DPS assumes only one enemy is hit and is not frozen.</ref>
$FNC-UPGRADE$ = Heavier Swings; Better Sledge; Freezing Point; Ice Breaker; Arctic Aftershocks
$FNC-UPGRADEICON$ = File:SledgerLevel1.png; File:SledgerLevel2.png; File:SledgerLevel3.png; File:SledgerLevel4.png; File:SledgerLevel5.png
$FNC-DETECTION$ = ; 0;
</var>
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Frozen Damage$FREF$ !! Aftershock Damage !! Swingrate !! Aftershock Delay !! Range !! Max Hits !! Slowdown per Hit !! Max Slowdown !! Slowdown Time !! Freeze Time !! DPS$DREF$ !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$FNC-TOTALPRICE$}} || 8 || N/A || N/A || 1.2 || N/A || 6.5 || 3 || 15% || 45% || 4 || N/A || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$FNC-TOTALPRICE$}} || 12 || N/A || N/A || 1.2 || N/A || 6.5 || 4 || 25% || 45% || 4 || N/A || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$FNC-TOTALPRICE$}} || 25 || N/A || N/A || 1.2 || N/A || 7 || 5 || 25% || 45% || 4 || N/A || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$FNC-TOTALPRICE$}} || 45 || N/A || N/A || 1.2 || N/A || 7 || 5 || 30% || 60% || 4 || 1.5 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$FNC-TOTALPRICE$}} || 75 || 150 || N/A || 1.2 || N/A || 7.5 || 5 || 45% || 65% || 5 || 1.5 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 5 || {{Money|$FNC-TOTALPRICE$}} || 140 || 280 || 28 || 1.2 || 0.4 || 7.5 || 7 || 80% || 80% || 6 || 1.75 || $DPS2$<ref>$DPS$ Normal DPS + $AFDPS$ Aftershock DPS</ref> || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
